name: browser_click_audit
description: Audit a single click: screenshot beforeâ†’clickâ†’waitâ†’screenshot afterâ†’image diffâ†’error collectionâ†’return. One call replaces 6+ individual tool calls for click-through validation loops. Returns navigation status, visual diff ratio, console/network errors, and screenshot paths.

selector.description: CSS selector of the element to click (required unless 'text' is provided)

text.description: Text content of the element to find and click (alternative to 'selector', uses accessibility tree)

waitMs.description: Wait time after click in milliseconds before capturing results

autoReturn.description: Automatically navigate back after audit (goBack for URL nav, re-click for SPA toggle)

label.description: Human-readable label for this audit step (used in screenshot filenames)
